name: Suzan's Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together except Parmesan.
2. Pour into a greased casserole dish (approximately 13 x 9 inches).
3. Sprinkle Parmesan over the top, about 1/4 cup.
4. Bake for 1 hour at 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. This recipe can be doubled easily and prepared in advance, baking just before serving.
